title: BREAKING: Trump says US-Iran nuclear deal 'not dead' but Iran must move faster - exclusive
snippet: Trump gave exclusive interview to Reuters saying US-Iran nuclear deal not dead but Iran must move faster. Trump spoke with Khamenei 'probably a few weeks ago'. Trump said tariffs are 'fantastic' for US economy. Will impose secondary tariffs on any country buying Iranian oil.

title: Trump says tariffs are 'fantastic' for US economy in Fox News interview
snippet: Trump reaffirms tariffs are 'fantastic' for US economy; confirms Iran nuclear deal is 'not dead'; discusses Iran negotiations
